steps.title: Control Dashboard
steps.text: Surgewave Control provides a customizable Blazor dashboard with 14 widgets organized in three rows: summary metrics at the top, detailed metrics in the middle, and data tables at the bottom.

steps.title: Dashboard Widgets
steps.text: Widgets include Cluster Status, Throughput, Brokers, Topics, Latency charts, Consumer Groups, Partitions, Errors, Pipelines, Connectors, and Cluster Information. Metrics auto-refresh every 5 seconds.

steps.title: Widget Customization
steps.text: Widgets support drag-and-drop reordering, visibility toggling, and theme switching between dark and light modes. All preferences persist to localStorage and restore on reload.

steps.title: Consumer Lag and Alerting
steps.text: The dashboard integrates with Prometheus for alerting on consumer lag, broker downtime, under-replicated partitions, high latency, and error rates. Consumer group detail pages show per-partition lag.
